Custom apex remains blocked by Cloudflare zone-create permission and Namecheap NS/allowlist gates.

entries.name: The Scriptorium
entries.currentFocus: S19 Run-aware pipeline fix — Triage now initializes book selector from activeRun.bookNumber (founder's Book 1 batch was hidden behind hardcoded book=2); new GuidedRunStrip surfaces per-stage hints + cross-screen jumps on Score Chapters when run.mode=guided; BatchScore now shows Run-attachment banner and checkpoints stageProgress.SCORE.done/total at four completion sites. 597/597 tests, build green.

entries.name: Solara

entries.name: SparkFunnel

Migration 0007 applied and verified 10/10 live objects; CAPTURE_NONCE_SECRET uploaded to CF Pages production; starter community goals seeded and verified; one high-confidence experiment promoted to running. Added admin cockpit tabs, campaign simulator, learned journey/recommendation signals, attribution repair actions, AI/token budget controls, capture nonce hardening, security headers, and leaderboard DOM hardening. 257/257 tests, typecheck/lint/build clean.

Remaining work is Vercel/DNS attachment verification plus durable browser smoke automation, external live backend recovery or Hetzner cutover, live seed capture, provider-key completion, production project-ops redeploy, and large-page consolidation.

SW cache v46 → v47. Tests 860/860 throughout.

entries.name: Studio Ops

entries.name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
entries.currentFocus: S125 COMPLETE — root-caused 3rd Turnstile login-hang failure mode (interaction-only widget in hidden container can't host interactive challenges → callbacks never fire → button stuck on 'Entering…'). Fix: visible-fallback via `before-interactive-callback` + 12s `getToken()` timeout in `assets/turnstile.js` + `data-vs-turnstile-slot` markers in vault-member auth forms. Plus 'Deep forge' → 'Vault Sealed' copy sweep across 82 pages. Memory updated (Rule 4 added to Turnstile pattern memo).

Next: live push delivery validation plus Evidence/Scenario test coverage.
